name: ExtensionInventoryReport_ReportedDateTime
title: R5: When the report has been submitted (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `InventoryReport.reportedDateTime` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`InventoryReport.reportedDateTime` 1..1 `dateTime`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `InventoryReport.reportedDateTime` 1..1 `dateTime`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `InventoryReport.reportedDateTime` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `InventoryReport` is not mapped.
Element `InventoryReport.reportedDateTime` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
